notes.induced_not_recovered_rate_all: fraction of truly-induced events NOT recovered as Induced-cascade. Under a temporal GT (window = gt_ref), corrected is low largely by label consistency; the CONTESTED rate is the non-tautological number (where a competing audit anchor makes the order decide). The paper reports the label MIGRATION, not this rate, because the temporal GT and the priority order share the same aftermath window; the rate is released for completeness.
notes.induced_not_recovered_rate_contested: restricted to GT events with an audit anchor within W: here the priority order genuinely decides Induced-cascade vs Direct-anchor. Read together with the controlled oracle (exp_dbcascade), which supplies provenance ground truth independent of the labeler's windows.
notes.induced_window_coverage: GT is the temporal window, so this is coverage, not independent detection; naive is 0 by construction.
notes.literal_may: reproduces the shipped May binary (Direct-first, no legit exception); submitted isolates ONLY the ordering vs corrected.
